description_long: This cabin features a steeply pitched, thatched hip roof constructed from natural reeds or straw, giving it a rustic and traditional appearance. The exterior walls are clad in a similar organic material, blending seamlessly with the roof and enhancing the earthy aesthetic. The structure is set atop an octagonal wooden platform that extends outward, forming a broad, wraparound deck. Two rectangular windows are symmetrically placed on each visible wall, providing ventilation and light, while a single, centered door is present on one side. The overall form is compact and geometric, with clean lines and a strong emphasis on natural materials. The cabin's design suggests a simple, functional shelter suitable for rural or park-like urban settings.
description: A rustic cabin with a steep thatched hip roof, natural reed walls, and an octagonal wraparound wooden deck. Symmetrical windows and a central door complete its simple, earthy design.
description_view_0: This view shows a wall with two rectangular windows and no visible door, highlighting the thatched roof and the wooden deck.
description_view_1: This view reveals the front of the cabin, featuring a centered door flanked by two windows, all set against the thatched wall and deck.
description_view_2: This side view displays two rectangular windows similar to view 0, with the thatched roof and deck clearly visible.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 0, showing two windows and the thatched roof, emphasizing the symmetry of the cabin's design.
attribute_roof_type: hip roof, steeply pitched, thatched with natural reeds or straw
attribute_window_arrangement: Two medium-sized rectangular windows symmetrically placed on each visible wall, for a total of six visible windows, evenly distributed and aligned in pairs
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, flanked by two windows
